Cubic¶

Generates the only known non-quadratic APN polynomial, which is defined over GF(2^6)

1function generateCubicPolynomial()
2    n := 6;
3    FF<p> := GF(2^n);
4    P<x> := PolynomialRing(FF);
5    F1 := x^3 + p^17 * (x^17 + x^18 + x^20 + x^24);
6    F2 := p^14 * (Trace( p^52 * x^3 + p^6 * x^5 + p^19 * x^7 + p^28 * x^11 + p^2 * x^13) + (p^2*x)^9 + (p^2*x)^18 + (p^2*x)^36 + x^21 + x^42);
7 return (F1 + F2);
8end function;
